title: Median over temporal domains
poc: select count(*) from voyages where departure_date < date '1770-02-23';
select count(*) from voyages where departure_date >= date '1770-02-23';
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE voyages (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, departure_date DATE NOT NULL, destination VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO voyages (departure_date, destination) VALUES (date '1770-01-01', 'London'), (date '1770-02-01', 'Paris'), (date '1770-03-01', 'New York');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM voyages WHERE departure_date IS NULL;
SELECT AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM departure_date)) FROM voyages;
